title: Wynntils Ottoman
description: All the mods needed for Wynncraft powered by Wynntils created by the Ottoman Empire.
body:
![Wynntils Ottoman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a92e47fe6092fdd084a1d2ce239defcfa1ac03.png) ## Wynntils Ottoman is a list of fabric mods configured to enhance your experience in [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/) on the latest version of Minecraft. Modpack will include several performance enhancer mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), and more. Gameplay is modified by [Wynntils](https://wynntils.com/). Additionally you can download Voices of Wynn which adds spoken dialogues to the game. I would suggest using it if planned on streaming or other uses. For more emmersive experience the modpack contains the [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) mod which allows you to set the render distance to insane heights while perforamce is usually the same without using it. _**Note**: I would suggest allocating more ram if you plan to use [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)._ ![pack-preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88f28daba69c24341ad5c8dec41e14f6a70dd110.png) | [WynnEdits - Dark Theme](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnedits-dark-theme) | [WynnEdits - Runic Theme](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnedits-runic-theme) | |---------------------|:---------------------:| | ![preview-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/350ce5805d0e9a400917d50bdd71d32391942372.jpeg) | ![preview-3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d344ab2e2488e896dd90a8d00c952503ea9a74e.jpeg) | | /Class Page | /Class Page | | ![preview-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786ba2b4a8ee7bb635cc55bd34efae493d303bb0.png) | ![preview-4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50e089feecccfba1d62787a905653e968b1ee8d6.png) | | In-game UI | In-game UI | ![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd044221b21ca92eedf0ce08b9dc76400f2ec209.png)
Modpack Content

Mods Included:
  • Bobby
  • Continuity
  • Cloth Config
  • Controlling
  • Distant Horizons
  • Dynamic FPS
  • Entity Culling
  • Indium
  • Iris Shaders
  • JsMacros
  • M.R.U
  • Mod Menu
  • Noisium
  • Reese's Sodium Options
  • Searchables
  • Serverpack Priority
  • Sodium
  • Sodium Extra
  • Sounds
  • Sounds
  • Text Placeholder
  • Wynntils
  • YetAnotherConfigLib
  • Zoomify

Texture & Shader Packs:
  • WynnEdits - Dark Theme
  • WynnEdits - Runic Theme
  • qcrafty's Capitalized Font
  • Complementary Shaders - Reimanged
    • Settings from demonjoeTV
  • Complementary Shaders - Reimanged
    • Settings from Disruptive Builds
